## Checklist

- [ ] My change follows the existing code style and stays focused.
- [ ] I did not log, expose, or commit any daily.dev API token or secret.
- [ ] Token handling (if touched) stays server-side in `src/lib/` / `src/pages/api/`.
- [ ] I updated docs (README/CONTRIBUTING) if behavior or setup changed.
